name: review_pr
description: Review an AI-generated pull request against its linked issue

decision.description: approve=ready to merge, request_changes=has blocking issues, comment=needs human judgment

summary.description: 1-2 sentence review summary explaining the decision

addresses_issue.description: Whether the PR changes directly address the problem stated in the linked issue

follows_conventions.description: Whether the changes follow repo and project conventions

minimal_change.description: Whether the change is focused and minimal, without unrelated modifications

severity.description: blocking=must fix before merge, suggestion=should fix, nitpick=optional

file.description: File path relative to repo root

line.description: Line number in the diff (0 if file-level issue)

description.description: What is wrong and how to fix it

issues_found.description: Specific issues found in the PR

auto_merge_eligible.description: Whether the PR is eligible for auto-merge (approve + high confidence + no blocking issues + doc-only or convention fix)
